---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability, output format, scoring dimension, or example
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What's the gap?

<!-- What can the skill not currently do that you need it to do? -->

## What workflow or use case surfaced this?

<!-- Describe the real situation that made you want this feature -->

## What would the ideal output look like?

<!-- If you can, sketch what you'd want the skill to produce. Even a rough format helps. -->

## Which file(s) would this affect?

- [ ] `SKILL.md` — persona, triggers, or guiding principles
- [ ] `references/methodology.md` — analysis methodology
- [ ] `references/formats.md` — output formats or scoring
- [ ] `examples/` — new worked example
- [ ] New file needed

## Have you tried a workaround?

<!-- If yes, what did you do and why wasn't it sufficient? -->

## Priority (in your view)

- [ ] Critical — the skill is significantly limited without this
- [ ] High — would meaningfully improve output quality
- [ ] Medium — nice to have, not blocking
- [ ] Low — minor polish

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else — domain, team size, industry, related issues -->
